expected: Schedule today/timeline, overview overdue counts, and calendar month origin are derived from current/project/read-model dates instead of hardcoded March/April/June 2026 constants.
redEvidence: date-origin.test.ts was added before the production helper; initial pnpm/vitest run was blocked by node_modules infra while the imported helper did not exist.
greenEvidence: cmd /c ..\..\node_modules\.bin\vitest.exe run --config vitest.config.ts src/delivery/lib/date-origin.test.ts src/delivery/overview/overview-status.test.ts src/delivery/project-action-links.test.ts src/delivery/schedule/schedule-rows.test.ts src/workspace/projects/projects-list-surface.test.ts -> 5 files / 12 tests passed.
rg TODAY_DAY|const TODAY =|BASE_MS|Date.UTC(2026, 2, 2) in current delivery schedule/overview/calendars -> no current-source matches per agent report.
fixApplied: Added shared date-origin helpers for current plan date, schedule timeline, project month keys/grid, and overdue checks; schedule, calendars, and overview now consume those helpers instead of old mock epoch constants.
limitations: Browser screenshot traversal was not run in this slice.
regressionRisk: Medium-low. Date math is centralized and tested; visual placement still needs full browser traversal.
